witnesses.description: Three subsets of a four-element universe for a finite distributive identity.
Nested subsets witnessing finite subset transitivity.
A fixed finite assignment rejecting a malformed distributive law.

checks.claim: For the fixed finite sets, A union (B intersect C) equals (A union B) intersect (A union C).
checks.notes: The validator recomputes both sides over the explicit universe.

checks.claim: For the fixed finite sets, A subset B and B subset C imply A subset C.
checks.notes: The validator checks both subset premises and the transitive conclusion.

checks.claim: For the fixed finite sets, A intersect (B union C) equals (A intersect B) union C.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes both sides and confirms this malformed fixed identity fails.
